# front

> Four Claude / OpenCode skills for vanilla JavaScript + Tailwind CSS + Montserrat/Inter frontends. Released into the public domain under The Unlicense. For solo developers and small teams shipping internal tools without a designer.

This repository is a **bundle of four [Anthropic skills](https://resources.anthropic.com/hubfs/The-Complete-Guide-to-Building-Skill-for-Claude.pdf)**. Use them from **Claude Code** (`cp -r front-* ~/.claude/skills/`) or from **OpenCode** (`cp -r front-* ~/.opencode/skills/`). Each skill auto-triggers on its frontmatter description.

## Skill entry points

- [front-ui/SKILL.md](front-ui/SKILL.md): UI generation core — components, pages, dataviz, design system, dark mode. Always install.
- [front-cli-gui/SKILL.md](front-cli-gui/SKILL.md): Wrap an existing CLI in a single-page vanilla-JS + Tailwind GUI. Flagship.
- [front-publish/SKILL.md](front-publish/SKILL.md): Markdown → website, meta tags, favicons, site indexes, plain language.
- [front-accessibility/SKILL.md](front-accessibility/SKILL.md): a11y lint, contrast audit, CVD simulation, alt text, captions.

## front-ui core references

- [color-psychology.md](front-ui/references/color-psychology.md): Curated palettes (Choice / Emotion / Concept / Psychology) and the semantic-color mapping.
- [stack-vanilla-js.md](front-ui/references/stack-vanilla-js.md): Vanilla JS patterns — ES modules, native `<dialog>`, events, state, i18n.
- [stack-tailwind.md](front-ui/references/stack-tailwind.md): Tailwind config, base CSS, plugins, dark-mode strategy, Inter swap.
- [checklist.md](front-ui/references/checklist.md): Pre-ship quality gate.

## front-ui charts and dataviz

- [charts-vega.md](front-ui/references/charts-vega.md): Vega-Lite house style.
- [dataviz-chart-selection.md](front-ui/references/dataviz-chart-selection.md): Decision tree for picking the right chart shape.
- [dataviz-color-palettes.md](front-ui/references/dataviz-color-palettes.md): Sequential / divergent / categorical palettes.
- [dataviz-maps.md](front-ui/references/dataviz-maps.md): Map-specific ergonomics.
- [dashboard-ergonomics.md](front-ui/references/dashboard-ergonomics.md): Tile-by-tile dashboard layout.

## front-ui design system

- [ui-guidelines/INDEX.md](front-ui/references/ui-guidelines/INDEX.md): Full map (foundations, patterns, components, inputs, platforms). Apple HIG-derived.
- [material-design.md](front-ui/references/material-design.md): Material 3 distilled with Material → skill-token mapping.
- [anti-patterns.md](front-ui/references/anti-patterns.md): Visual and copy tells to refuse.
- [ux-psychology.md](front-ui/references/ux-psychology.md): Applied cognitive principles.
- [ergonomics-criteria.md](front-ui/references/ergonomics-criteria.md): Eight ergonomic criteria for UX audit.

## front-publish — HTML, meta, i18n, indexes

- [meta-tags.md](front-publish/references/meta-tags.md): `<meta>` tags — W3C / WHATWG + Open Graph + Twitter Cards + Schema.org JSON-LD.
- [site-indexes.md](front-publish/references/site-indexes.md): robots.txt + sitemap.xml + llms.txt + Atom/RSS + humans.txt.
- [plain-language.md](front-publish/references/plain-language.md): Copy rewriting at a target grade.
- [i18n.md](front-publish/references/i18n.md): Multilingual frontend — URL strategy, `Intl.*`, plurals, RTL. Language pair configurable.

## front-accessibility — accessibility audits and content

- [lint-a11y.md](front-accessibility/references/lint-a11y.md): 14-rule static a11y lint. Honest framing — pre-commit gate, not a replacement for axe-core.
- [contrast-audit.md](front-accessibility/references/contrast-audit.md): WCAG ratio audit + OKLCH-neighbour fix hint.
- [cvd-simulation.md](front-accessibility/references/cvd-simulation.md): Protanopia / deuteranopia / tritanopia rendering.
- [alt-text-ai.md](front-accessibility/references/alt-text-ai.md): W3C-compliant alt text via local Ollama + Gemma vision.
- [captions-ai.md](front-accessibility/references/captions-ai.md): WebVTT / SRT captions via local pywhispercpp.

## Scripts (Python, cross-platform)

- [front-ui/scripts/validate.py](front-ui/scripts/validate.py): Pre-ship quality gate. Stdlib only.
- [front-publish/scripts/favicons.py](front-publish/scripts/favicons.py): Favicon / PWA / Apple-touch / maskable icon set + manifest + head snippet.
- [front-publish/scripts/meta_from_ollama.py](front-publish/scripts/meta_from_ollama.py): Drafts page meta tags from a goal or HTML page.
- [front-publish/scripts/site_indexes.py](front-publish/scripts/site_indexes.py): robots, sitemap, llms.txt, feed, humans.
- [front-publish/scripts/plain_language.py](front-publish/scripts/plain_language.py): Rewrites UI copy at a target reading grade.
- [front-accessibility/scripts/lint_a11y.py](front-accessibility/scripts/lint_a11y.py): 14-rule static a11y lint.
- [front-colors/scripts/audit_contrast.py](front-colors/scripts/audit_contrast.py): WCAG contrast audit + OKLCH fix suggester.
- [front-colors/scripts/simulate_cvd.py](front-colors/scripts/simulate_cvd.py): CVD image transforms.
- [front-colors/scripts/_colors.py](front-colors/scripts/_colors.py): Shared color primitives (sRGB, WCAG, OKLab/OKLCH, CVD matrices, palette accessors, perceptual lighten/darken).
- [front-colors/references/palette.csv](front-colors/references/palette.csv): Curated palette — one row per color, semantic projections (Base / Emotion / Concepts / Psychology±) as columns.
- [front-vision/scripts/alt_from_ollama.py](front-vision/scripts/alt_from_ollama.py): W3C alt text via local Ollama vision (default `gemma4:e4b`, `-mlx` on Apple silicon).
- [front-vision/scripts/install_alt_ai.py](front-vision/scripts/install_alt_ai.py): Installs Ollama + pulls the vision model.
- [front-audio/scripts/captions_from_whisper.py](front-audio/scripts/captions_from_whisper.py): WebVTT / SRT captions via pywhispercpp.
- [front-audio/scripts/install_captions.py](front-audio/scripts/install_captions.py): Installs pywhispercpp + model.

## Assets

- [front-ui/assets/starter-page.html](front-ui/assets/starter-page.html): Single-file page bootstrap (Montserrat + Tailwind + tokens).
- [front-ui/assets/components/](front-ui/assets/components/): Copy-paste HTML snippets + Vega-Lite chart specs.
- [front-ui/assets/fonts/montserrat/](front-ui/assets/fonts/montserrat/): Montserrat WOFF2 + `OFL.txt` + `fonts.css`.
- [front-cli-gui/assets/examples/cli-gui-demo/](front-cli-gui/assets/examples/cli-gui-demo/): Runnable CLI → GUI worked example.

## Optional

- [README.md](README.md): Human-facing English README with the "Inputs → outputs" table and the audience definition.
- [LISEZMOI.md](LISEZMOI.md): Human-facing French README (legacy — pending 0.2.0 parity update).
- [LANDSCAPE.md](LANDSCAPE.md): Comparison matrices vs alternatives.
- [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md): Release notes (0.2.0 = the four-skill split).
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md): How to propose changes.
- [LICENSE.md](LICENSE.md): The Unlicense + Montserrat OFL carve-out.
